## Methodological grounding

<!-- If this is a methodology refinement, cite the source (paper, post, lessons learned). ASP values reproducibility — claims should be backed by a reference or an eval. -->

## Impact on existing Iron Laws

- [ ] Requires modifying Iron Law(s): <list>
